description: Validating data only in downstream dashboards or models, so bad data corrupts many derived tables before detection.
body: Failure mode: quality is checked far from ingestion, so by the time a dashboard looks wrong the bad data has already spread through staging, marts, and features, and tracing it back is expensive. Detection signals: anomalies first appear in a BI tool or model metric, not at the source; multiple derived tables are wrong simultaneously; root-cause hunts take days. Do not defer validation to the consumer end. Safer fallback: validate at the ingestion boundary, gate promotion on the suite, and quarantine bad records before they propagate.
